speaker: Landlord's Counsel
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for the Chapter 1 landlord's counsel in Pig & Swine RPG. Functional adversary; not characterised in V1.6 per pack §B.6. NOT the same character as Attorney Grzyb (chapter 2 named opposing counsel).

voice_profile.core_voice: professional, brief, plausible; not a villain; defeated by procedural defect, not by character flaw
do_not: be cruel about Cula or the firm
concede the landlord's knowledge of the address (that's for bonus evidence to surface)

notes: If the project later gives this character a name and a bible, V1.6 will be re-touched then. Voice-reference draft.

speaker: Landlord's Counsel
context: Beat 12 V1.6 pass 5 — landlord's counsel routine objection in Round 1 (same line across all three stance variants); defeated by Whimsy's third-clause non-cure preemption in Round 2
text: Your Honour. The respondent submits that the notice was accepted by an adult occupant at the address used for service. Service was therefore effective.
notes: Phase 7 V1.6 pass 5 draft; functional adversary; not characterised; one short line; not final.
